changes.value:
## What
Update all `use sem_core::` imports in swissarmyhammer-tools to `use swissarmyhammer_sem::`. Update Cargo.toml to depend on `swissarmyhammer-sem` instead of `sem-core`.

Import mapping:
- `sem_core::git::types::{FileChange, FileStatus}` → `swissarmyhammer_sem::git_types::{FileChange, FileStatus}`
- `sem_core::model::change::{ChangeType, SemanticChange}` → `swissarmyhammer_sem::model::change::{ChangeType, SemanticChange}`
- `sem_core::model::entity::SemanticEntity` → `swissarmyhammer_sem::model::entity::SemanticEntity`
- `sem_core::model::identity::match_entities` → `swissarmyhammer_sem::model::identity::match_entities`
- `sem_core::parser::differ::{compute_semantic_diff, DiffResult}` → `swissarmyhammer_sem::parser::differ::{compute_semantic_diff, DiffResult}`
- `sem_core::parser::plugins::create_default_registry` → `swissarmyhammer_sem::parser::plugins::create_default_registry`
- REMOVE `sem_core::git::bridge::GitBridge` (replaced in SEM-4)

Files:
- `swissarmyhammer-tools/Cargo.toml` — replace `sem-core` dep with `swissarmyhammer-sem`
- `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/git/diff/mod.rs` — update all imports
- `swissarmyhammer-tools/tests/git_diff_integration_test.rs` — update all imports

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No `sem_core` references anywhere in swissarmyhammer-tools
- [ ] `cargo check -p swissarmyhammer-tools` passes
- [ ] All existing tests pass

## Tests
- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-tools` passes
- [ ] `grep -r sem_core swissarmyhammer-tools/` returns nothing
